summary: CRITICAL: ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 is missing entirely—the workflow will fail on first run. Action ref not pinned to SHA. Workflow uses redundant `pwsh -NoProfile -File` subprocess call (line 33-37 integration job) instead of direct invocation under `shell: pwsh`. Script lacks Set-StrictMode, param validation attributes, date input validation, and structured error handling. Test script uses fragile grep patterns for YAML parsing. Incomplete TDD implementation violates task requirements. Non-functional as delivered.
